privileged_info_summary: The task creates synthetic data via Odoo XML-RPC API: a vendor 'Apex Components' supplies 10 units of 'Industrial Servo Motor' at $450.00 per unit. The setup establishes a complete Purchase Order → Receipt → Posted Vendor Bill workflow with the 10-unit inventory in stock. The expected_refund_amount of $1350.00 is the correct value for returning 3 units at $450.00 each.
